calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Continued To Mar-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Finn Pillsbury, petitioner in pro per.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

Mr. Pillsbury explained that the petition was filed for the limited purpose of obtaining access to the decedent's Apple account. The Court advised that the appropriate procedure would be to appoint petitioner as special administrator with limited authority and that procedural requirements would include submission of a proposed order and proof of notice to the decedent's mother.

The Court directed petitioner to contact the probate examiner for assistance with the appropriate form and proposed order and explained the need for proof of service reflecting notice to the decedent's mother.

The Court continued the matter to March 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to allow petitioner time to submit the required documentation, noting that the matter could be resolved without further appearance if the paperwork was properly submitted.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
